name: CEE major-router revision
body:
Frozen Computers & Electrical Engineering major-router revision with all-row and two-stage outcome routing, full prevention-retention frontiers, support-gated primary deployment, utility-aware thresholds, severity/group/mechanism/batch transport, engineering cost audits, exact environments, prediction-level source data, editable figures, and manuscript sources.

Computational snapshot: f8ef1a17bdfc98377334dd9aa6903702cdc789c1
Software DOI: not assigned.
